languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

languages.text: {n}Абеляр ошеломленно качает головой.{/n} "Сервочереп ваш... коллега? В таком случае инфопластина — мой адъютант!"
{n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Well then, I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

languages.text: {n}Abelard schüttelt amüsiert den Kopf.{/n} "Ein Servoschädel ... als Kollege? Natürlich. Ich habe ja auch einen Datablock als Adjutanten!"
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard schüttelt amüsiert den Kopf.{/n} "Ein Servoschädel ... als Kollege? Natürlich. Ich habe ja auch einen Datablock als Adjutanten!"

languages.text: {n}Abélard secoue la tête d'un air amusé.{/n} « Vous considérez ce servocrâne comme votre... collègue ? Très bien. Je vais aller nommer adjudante l'une de mes plaques de données de ce pas ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Abélard secoue la tête d'un air amusé.{/n} « Vous considérez ce servocrâne comme votre... collègue ? Très bien. Je vais aller nommer adjudante l'une de mes plaques de données de ce pas ! »

languages.text: {n}阿贝拉德困惑地摇了摇头。{/n}“把伺服头骨……当同僚？好吧。那我这就去认个数据板当副官！”
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

traits.locale_text: {n}阿贝拉德困惑地摇了摇头。{/n}“把伺服头骨……当同僚？好吧。那我这就去认个数据板当副官！”

languages.text: {n}Abelard niega con la cabeza, desconcertado.{/n} «Un servocráneo... ¿como colega? Ajá. ¡Entonces mi tablilla de datos es mi ayudante!».
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard niega con la cabeza, desconcertado.{/n} «Un servocráneo... ¿como colega? Ajá. ¡Entonces mi tablilla de datos es mi ayudante!».

languages.text: {n}アベラールが首を横に振る。{/n}「サーヴォスカルが同僚？そうだ。では、私はデータ・スレートを副官にしよう！」
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"

traits.locale_text: {n}アベラールが首を横に振る。{/n}「サーヴォスカルが同僚？そうだ。では、私はデータ・スレートを副官にしよう！」

languages.text: {n}Abelard, şaşkınlıkla başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Bir hizmelet... Meslektaşınız mı? İlginç. Ben de bir databelayı yaverim mi yapsam?"
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shakes his head in bemusement.{/n} "A servo-skull... as your colleague? Right. Then I'll take a data-slate for my adjutant!"
